body:
## Summary
- update backend DB test fixtures to include the now-required `email` field
- keep the missing-field test focused on `name` and `passwordHash` by supplying a valid email
- keep the username uniqueness test focused on duplicate `username` by using distinct emails

## Why
The `User` model now requires `email`, but `CardGame/backend/tests/db/user.model.test.js` still created users without it. This caused DB tests to fail with `ValidationError` instead of exercising the intended assertions.

## Impact
- no production code changes
- no API or model behavior changes
- only test data is aligned with the current schema contract

## Test Plan
- `npm test`
title: test: adapt db user model fixtures to required email
